note: Last upstream Superpowers release merged into this fork. To review what is new upstream before the next sync: `git fetch upstream && git log --oneline --no-merges v6.0.2..<next-tag>`. Update baseTag/baseCommit/mergeCommit/dates here whenever a new upstream release is merged. The fork's own version (package.json etc.) is independent of this and may collide numerically with an upstream tag — they are unrelated.
